SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.ui

Record Class RichTextPaneLayoutHelper.LayoutTextData

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.dua3.utility.ui.RichTextPaneLayoutHelper.LayoutTextData
Record Components:
text - the rich text data associated with the layout
layoutToSourceMap - an array mapping positions in the layout to the corresponding positions in the source text
sourceToLayoutMap - an array mapping positions in the source text to the corresponding positions in the layout
Enclosing class:
RichTextPaneLayoutHelper
public static record RichTextPaneLayoutHelper.LayoutTextData(RichText text, int[] layoutToSourceMap, int[] sourceToLayoutMap) extends Record
Represents structured mapping data between the layout and the source text within a rich text layout system. This record provides utilities to convert positions between layout and source text.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • LayoutTextData

      public LayoutTextData(RichText text, int[] layoutToSourceMap, int[] sourceToLayoutMap)
      Creates an instance of a LayoutTextData record class.
      Parameters:
      text - the value for the text record component
      layoutToSourceMap - the value for the layoutToSourceMap record component
      sourceToLayoutMap - the value for the sourceToLayoutMap record component

  • Method Details

    • layoutToSourcePosition

      public int layoutToSourcePosition(int layoutPosition)
      Converts a position in the layout to the corresponding position in the source text.
      Parameters:
      layoutPosition - the position in the layout to be converted
      Returns:
      the corresponding position in the source text, clamped to the valid range of the layout-to-source mapping

    • sourceToLayoutPosition

      public int sourceToLayoutPosition(int sourcePosition)
      Converts a position in the source text to the corresponding position in the layout.
      Parameters:
      sourcePosition - the position in the source text to be converted
      Returns:
      the corresponding position in the layout, clamped to the valid range of the source-to-layout mapping

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

      public RichText text()
      Returns the value of the text record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the text record component

      Returns the value of the layoutToSourceMap record component.

      the value of the sourceToLayoutMap record component
